evals.name: mixed-background-carousel
evals.prompt: Create four Instagram slides. Use my hero image and generate the other backgrounds.
evals.expected_output: Uses the live mixed-background contract, polls assets, previews slides, and verifies the ZIP.

evals.name: existing-images-carousel
evals.prompt: Turn these five image URLs into a 4:5 Instagram carousel with editable text.
evals.expected_output: Uses existing images, adds editable overlays, checks previews, and exports five slides.
